title.en: Ye Tian was shocked, did he leave the universe?

content.en:
Rumble!!!

Ye Tian only felt that there was a flicker in front of him, and an extremely terrifying force pulled him to break through the universe, pass through the endless chaos, and come to an incomparably magnificent hall.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was shocked, did he leave the universe?

No, it shouldn't be, he hasn't detached yet, and if he dares to leave the universe, he will definitely die.

Soon, he realized that he was not leaving with his real body, at least he couldn't sense the copy talent, and he couldn't see any of his talents, this body should just be a wisp of consciousness.

"Pulling a wisp of my consciousness here silently, without even attracting my attention at all, is too powerful!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He even felt that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor could even easily kill him in the universe, the universe was a place to protect the living beings in the universe, and the Chaos powerhouse couldn't kill the living beings in the universe at all, but the strong people of the Convergence Dao could.

However, the Dao Ancestor is such an existence, naturally he will not kill a little guy in the universe.

Rumble!!!

An incomparably majestic figure appeared in front of Ye Tian, this person was the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, but it should not be the true body of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, maybe it was just a clone.

"The disciple has seen the master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, you have become my official disciple, but since you are a cosmic being, there are many resources that you can't obtain, and many treasures that you can't enjoy. But in other ways, I can make it up for you. In terms of supernatural powers and physical body, you are doing very well, but your soul is still flawed, compared to ordinary geniuses, your soul is not weak, but as my disciple, your soul is too weak and too weak. The deity passed on to you the secret technique of burning fire to forge the soul, which is a supreme soul secret technique and cannot be passed on to others. I will pass on three thousand more scriptures to you to make up for the foundation. "

After speaking, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor pointed at Ye Tian's eyebrows, and countless mysteries condensed into two seeds, namely the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique and the Three Thousand Dao Sutras.

"I'll preach to you for another year!"

Before Ye Tian could ask, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor began to preach.

As soon as the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor spoke, Ye Tian's soul was shocked, and the whole person fell into countless mystical epiphanies, constantly absorbing the essence of the content of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's preaching.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor mainly talked about the way of the earth, the way of the law, and the way of the soul, and expounded countless rules from all aspects, which benefited Ye Tian a lot.

Of course, Ye Tian couldn't understand many of the contents.

However, he forcibly memorized it, and he could slowly understand it in the future.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

"Thank you Master for preaching to your disciples!"

Ye Tian sincerely thanked.

Although he has only been preaching for a year, his comprehension of the Great Dao has risen to several levels, and a year ago he did not understand the prototype of the Great Dao at all, but now he has a clue.

Of course, it is still difficult for him to condense the prototype of the Great Dao and walk out of his own Avenue, but he has a direction, which is much better than having no clue.

Other than that.

His entire state of mind has also improved a lot, and now he is already in the seventh level of perfection, and he is only one step away from the eighth level of state of mind.

Moreover, his whole will seemed to have been reshaped and became stronger.

In short, listening to the one-year sermon of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the harvest is too great and too great, no less than a million years of penance and enlightenment.

"If you have any questions, please ask me. If you miss this time, the next time we meet our master and apprentice will be the day you will be detached, or the day you will become a disciple. "

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said in a condensed voice.

Ye Tian gritted his teeth and said, "Master, I want to know how to successfully fuse the dual universes into a large universe, not by luck, but by 100% fusion!"

"Are you for your universe?" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor chuckled, "Do you know what a huge price you need to pay if you want to make the dual universes 100% successful? It can even be said that the price is even higher than the value of a large universe. "

"Please let the master know?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Two ways!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said, "The first way, find the Creation Source Stone and integrate it into the Dual Universe, you can make the two universes one hundred percent into the Great Universe. However, the Creation Source Stone is extremely cheap in the chaos, and its value is very high, if a strong person in the True Spirit Realm gets a Creation Source Stone, he can even condense a true avenue and step into the realm of the Great Dao. It can be said that a Creation Source Stone can create a Dao Realm powerhouse. Even if it is a large universe, its value is far inferior to that of the Great Dao powerhouse. The second method is to integrate a Origin Cosmic Heart into the Dual Universe, although this difficulty is simpler, but it restricts the transcendent organization. The Origin Cosmic Heart is an Origin Cosmic Heart that is condensed by integrating all the power into the inner universe when the Great Dao Realm transcendent falls. The Origin Cosmic Heart is very valuable to the transcendent, and it is difficult for outsiders to obtain. "

"This ......"

Ye Tian didn't know what to say, these two methods were too difficult, at least he couldn't do it, after all, he was still in the universe and couldn't leave the universe.

Of course, he also knew that his master would definitely be able to obtain these two treasures easily, but why should he ask his master to help?

With the realm and strength of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, I don't know how many formal disciples there are, and I really don't value a formal disciple, so it is impossible for a formal disciple to give whatever he wants.

Unless he can be promoted to a personal disciple, then he may be able to ask the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to help.

Before Ye Tian could speak again, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor waved his hand, allowing Ye Tian's consciousness to return to the Chaos God Realm.

"It's back!"

Ye Tian sighed a little, although he became an official disciple, he still couldn't solve the problem of the dual universe.

"It's still strength, if I can become a personal disciple of Shizun, then there is a way. The next target is to pass on the disciples!"

Ye Tian clenched his fists and said secretly.

Soon, Ye Tian came out of the temple, and did not stay in the Chaos God Realm for long, but left quickly.

Now, the Chaos God Realm has no help for him, and everything can only be on his own.

Terran.

Ye Tian came back and soon entered a state of retreat.

The three thousand Dao Sutras and the two great inheritances of the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique, he needs to sort them out.

Strictly speaking, the Three Thousand Dao Sutras are not cultivation exercises, but a kind of sorting out of basic knowledge, and it is an encapsulation of the basic knowledge of chaos.

Ye Tian had hardly received too complete inheritance and guidance before, and his foundation seemed to be very solid, but it was still very weak, but the three thousand Dao Sutras could make up for Ye Tian's insight to a level comparable to that of the real top genius of Chaos, and he could recognize where his flaws were, and then how to make up for them.

It can be said that although the Three Thousand Dao Sutras cannot improve his strength, they can strengthen his foundation several times, and there will be more room for improvement in the future.

And the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique is even more remarkable, he can make Ye Tian's soul in a kind of void soul fire calcination, constantly refining the soul, and making the soul transform again and again.

There are a total of nine layers of the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique, each layer is equivalent to a transformation, once the nine transformations are completed, the soul will become extremely powerful, and with each transformation, the comprehension and soul power will skyrocket.

Before, Ye Tian's comprehension was average, but if he cultivated the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique to the ninth-layer realm, he would even be able to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram to perfection.

But after reading the entire Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique, Ye Tian knew that this exercise was very difficult and terrifying, even if it was a real top genius in Chaos, he could not cultivate it to the ninth layer, and the human soul has a limit, some people will not be able to cultivate anymore when they cultivate to the third or fourth layer, and if they cultivate again, their souls will collapse.

Any genius who has cultivated the Burning Flame Forging Soul Technique to the seventh layer realm is definitely a true top genius, and even some disciples of the Dao Ancestor may not be able to do it.
